mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pacs_realtime_notification_events ( hospital_id, source, event_type, severity, title, message, worklist_id, study_id, worklist_public_key, study_public_key, patient_name, visit_code, accession_number, dedupe_key ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{source}, #{type}, #{severity}, #{title}, #{message}, #{worklistId}, #{studyId}, #{worklistPublicKey}, #{studyPublicKey}, #{patientName}, #{visitCode}, #{accessionNumber}, #{dedupeKey} ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id AS event_id, hospital_id, source, event_type, severity, title, message, worklist_id, study_id, worklist_public_key, study_public_key, patient_name, visit_code, accession_number, dedupe_key, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SSOF') AS created_at FROM pacs_realtime_notification_events WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND id > #{afterId} ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pacs_realtime_notification_events WHERE created_at < NOW() - (#{retentionDays} * INTERVAL '1 day')
